Shop & garage

More than a garage.

Detached climate-controlled shop

A serious space for cars, projects, storage, and possibilities.

The shop is visually integrated with the property and offers the kind of flexible square footage that is difficult to duplicate.

Fully insulated, drywalled, climate controlled, and equipped with a bathroom, this structure can serve a car collector, hobbyist, small business owner, woodworker, fitness enthusiast, or anyone who needs serious functional space.

  • Climate controlled
  • Bathroom
  • Fully drywalled and insulated
  • Room for 6+ vehicles
  • Workshop potential
  • Separate mower/storage bay
  • Sidewalk connection to residence
  • Designed to complement the home

1 Woodland Drive

Augusta, KS 67010
